allow: Bash(docker volume ls | grep pgdata && docker logs 4thitek-postgres-1 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(git add docker-compose.yaml && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Hardcode default postgres password in docker-compose

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git remote set-url origin git@github.com:vominhduc11/4thitek.git && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "
SELECT a.id, a.username, a.email, a.role, a.status, a.created_at
FROM accounts a
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "\\d accounts" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "
SELECT a.id, a.username, a.email, a.created_at,
       ar.roles as role
FROM accounts a
LEFT JOIN account_roles ar ON ar.account_id = a.id
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "SELECT id, username, email, created_at FROM accounts ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "\\d account_roles" && \\
docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "SELECT * FROM account_roles WHERE account_id = 1;" && \\
docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "\\d dealers")

Bash(docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "SELECT * FROM roles;" && \\
docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "SELECT * FROM dealers WHERE id_account = 1;")

Bash(docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "
TRUNCATE TABLE 
  warranties, dealer_support_tickets, dealer_cart_items, order_items, payments,
  orders, product_serials, product_of_carts, notifies, password_reset_tokens,
  bulk_discounts, blogs, category_blogs, admin_settings,
  admins, customers, dealers, account_roles, accounts,
  products, roles
RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;
")

Bash(docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "
SELECT schemaname, tablename, n_live_tup 
FROM pg_stat_user_tables 
ORDER BY tablename;
")

Bash(docker exec 4thitek-postgres-1 psql -U app -d app_db -c "
SELECT relname as table, n_live_tup as rows
FROM pg_stat_user_tables
ORDER BY relname;
")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/login \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"email":"owner@4thitek.vn","password":"Test123"}' | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/login \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"username":"owner@4thitek.vn","password":"YourStrongPassword123"}' | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(sleep 3 && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4173/api/v1/auth/login \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d @/tmp/login_test.json | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/swagger-ui/index.html -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" && curl -s "http://localhost:8080/api/v3/api-docs" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | head -50 || curl -s "http://localhost:8080/swagger-ui/index.html" -w "\\n%{http_code}")
